---
id: get-provider-config
title: "Get provider config"
description: "Get OAuth app configuration for a provider type (admin only). Secrets are not exposed."
sidebar_label: "Get provider config"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: core/api_reference/sercha-core-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get provider config"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/providers/{type}/config"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get OAuth app configuration for a provider type (admin only). Secrets are not exposed.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"Provider type (e.g., github, slack, notion)","in":"path","name":"type","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"created_at":{"type":"string"},"enabled":{"type":"boolean"},"has_secrets":{"type":"boolean"},"provider_type":{"enum":["github","gitlab","bitbucket","slack","discord","msteams","notion","confluence","google_docs","jira","linear","google_drive","dropbox","onedrive","s3","zendesk","intercom"],"type":"string","x-enum-varnames":["ProviderTypeGitHub","ProviderTypeGitLab","ProviderTypeBitbucket","ProviderTypeSlack","ProviderTypeDiscord","ProviderTypeMSTeams","ProviderTypeNotion","ProviderTypeConfluence","ProviderTypeGoogleDocs","ProviderTypeJira","ProviderTypeLinear","ProviderTypeGoogleDrive","ProviderTypeDropbox","ProviderTypeOneDrive","ProviderTypeS3","ProviderTypeZendesk","ProviderTypeIntercom"]},"updated_at":{"type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"400":{"description":"Missing provider type","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"403":{"description":"Forbidden - admin only","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"404":{"description":"Provider not configured","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"500":{"description":"Internal server error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
